context: Tests whether the agent applies SwiftData CloudKit compatibility rules without overcorrecting scalar properties.

checklist.name: Unique unsupported
checklist.description: Flags @Attribute(.unique), @Unique, or unique constraints as incompatible with SwiftData CloudKit sync.

checklist.name: Optional relationship
checklist.description: Flags the required relationship and recommends making relationships optional for CloudKit sync.

checklist.name: Deny delete
checklist.description: Flags the deny delete rule as incompatible with CloudKit-backed SwiftData sync.

checklist.name: External storage
checklist.description: Recommends external storage for large Data such as image blobs.

checklist.name: No scalar overcorrection
checklist.description: Does not claim every scalar attribute must be optional.

checklist.name: Corrected sketch
checklist.description: Provides a corrected model sketch or specific replacement lines for the incompatible fields.

checklist.name: Schema rollout
checklist.description: Mentions CloudKit production schema promotion or additive-schema constraints.

checklist.name: Capabilities
checklist.description: Mentions iCloud CloudKit and Remote notifications/background setup for automatic sync.
